# qfs driver catalog

Every service is mounted at a path prefix (e.g. `/mail`, `/s3`). Each one has a shape тАФ one of four archetypes (Blob, Relational, Append, ObjectGraph) тАФ that decides which verbs it supports. A path only offers the verbs that make sense for it; using an unsupported verb is **rejected immediately with a clear error**, never half-applied. The catalog below is generated from your installed binary, so it always matches what you have.

The verbs are always `select` / `insert` / `upsert` / `update` / `remove` (plus `call`). Where a `native verbs` line mentions `ls`/`cp`/`mv`/`rm`, those are just familiar filesystem **aliases** for the same verbs in the interactive shell (`ls` is a `select`, `cp` an `upsert`, `rm` a `remove`) тАФ not a second set of operations.

## Drivers

### `/claude` тАФ RelationalTable

- example node: `/claude/sessions`
- native verbs: SELECT

Universal verbs (тЬУ supported / тЬЧ rejected at parse time):

| verb | supported |
|------|-----------|
| `select` | тЬУ |
| `insert` | тЬЧ |
| `upsert` | тЬЧ |
| `update` | тЬЧ |
| `remove` | тЬЧ |
| `ls` | тЬЧ |
| `cp` | тЬЧ |
| `mv` | тЬЧ |
| `rm` | тЬЧ |

Procedures: _none_

Prelude aliases: _none_

Pushdown: where=false project=false limit=false order=false join=false aggregate=false distinct=false group_by=false

### `/drive` тАФ BlobNamespace

- example node: `/drive/my/Reports/report.pdf`
- native verbs: SELECT INSERT UPSERT UPDATE REMOVE LS CP MV

Universal verbs (тЬУ supported / тЬЧ rejected at parse time):

| verb | supported |
|------|-----------|
| `select` | тЬУ |
| `insert` | тЬУ |
| `upsert` | тЬУ |
| `update` | тЬУ |
| `remove` | тЬУ |
| `ls` | тЬУ |
| `cp` | тЬУ |
| `mv` | тЬУ |
| `rm` | тЬЧ |

Procedures (`call drive.action(..)`):

| procedure | params | irreversible |
|-----------|--------|--------------|
| `copy` | file_id: Text, parent_id: Text, parent_path: Text, name: Text | no |

Prelude aliases: _none_

Pushdown: where=true project=false limit=true order=false join=false aggregate=false distinct=false group_by=false

- native verbs: SELECT INSERT UPDATE

### `/mail` тАФ AppendLog

- example node: `/mail/drafts`
- native verbs: SELECT(tail) INSERT(append) UPSERT

Universal verbs (тЬУ supported / тЬЧ rejected at parse time):

| verb | supported |
|------|-----------|

| `insert` | тЬУ |

| `rm` | тЬЧ |

Procedures (`call mail.action(..)`):

| procedure | params | irreversible |
|-----------|--------|--------------|
| `send` | to: Text, subject: Text, body: Text, attachments: Array(Struct({filename: Text, mime: Text, bytes: Bytes})) | yes |
| `reply` | body: Text, to: Text, cc: Text, subject: Text, attachments: Array(Struct({filename: Text, mime: Text, bytes: Bytes})) | no |

Prelude aliases: `SEND` тЖТ `mail.send`

## Codecs (decode / encode formats)

Codecs bridge blob тЖФ relational independent of driver identity. Builtin formats:

- `csv`
- `json`
- `jsonl`
- `md`
- `toml`
- `yaml`
